titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 88: The Gal Mahjong
Simple 1500 シリーズ Vol.88 The ギャル麻雀 Love Songs アイドルはハイレ～ト

descriptions.text: The Gal Mahjong: Love Songs - Idol wa High Rate is a mahjong game in which the player takes the role of a high school student that will try to win the heart of one of the 8 girls that the game features.
